heading: Submarginal lands of United States held in trust for Stockbridge Munsee Indian Community
label: 5503 Submarginal lands of United States held in trust for Stockbridge Munsee Indian Community
text: All of the right, title, and interest of the United States in all the minerals including gas and oil underlying the submarginal lands declared to be held in trust for the Stockbridge Munsee Indian Community by the Act of (), are hereby declared to be held by the United States in trust for the Stockbridge Munsee Indian Community.October 9, 197286 Stat. 795
